meta.currentSource: CFPB / FFIEC HMDA combined Modified LAR (loan-level public dataset, early release)
meta.priorSource: CFPB / FFIEC HMDA Data Browser (loan-level public dataset)
meta.note: Year-over-year compares the 2024 finalized Snapshot dataset with the 2025 early-release combined Modified LAR. Both are CFPB HMDA loan-level public data covering the same universe and computed identically; 2025 figures will be reconciled when the 2025 Snapshot publishes.
